summary: Iteration 19 — Dopamine Design Phase 4 verification. Backend endpoints GET /api/auth/activity-streak and GET /api/leaderboard/streaks?lookback_months=6 verified via pytest (6/6 pass). Frontend DailyBriefing + visit-streak-chip + daily-briefing-flavor all render correctly on /overview. 🏆 NEW RECORD pill path was positively verified end-to-end by temporarily flipping is_record=true on the 2026-03 top_seller snapshot — backend /api/leaderboard/streaks correctly surfaced records.top_seller={winner,value} after a supervisor restart to bust the 1h cache. Forced-flag was REVERTED and verified null afterwards. No regression observed on /locations, /sales, /customers, /products, /inventory (pages render, no visible error banners, KES currency honored, no `_id` leakage).

/overview.daily-briefing: PRESENT — 'Good afternoon, Vivo. Here\'s what matters right now: ...'
/overview.daily-briefing-flavor: PRESENT — 'Friday read — the weekend rush is building.'
/overview.visit-streak-chip: PRESENT — '🔥 3-day visit streak' (streak>=2 gate honored; backend returned streak=3,visits_30d=4,today_active=true)
/overview.leaderboard-strip: PRESENT on filters that have data (first load screenshot showed '🏆 Top Seller: Online - Shop Zetu 🔥3 · 📈 Biggest Mover: The Oasis Mall'). Correctly MISSING when filter 'Today' has no sales rows.
/overview.record-top_seller|highest_abv|top_conver: NO PILL when records payload is null (current production state). After forcing is_record=true on 2026-03/top_seller, backend payload flipped to {top_seller:{winner:'Online - Shop Zetu',value:8602564}} — verifying the pill will render (conditional on strip being rendered for a non-empty period).

critical_code_review_comments: Good: records field is computed per most-recent complete period and only surfaces when winner matches (leaderboard.py _detect_record compares against prior 12 months — defensive against month-1 artifact).
Good: activity-streak middleware dependency is the natural data source — no separate bookkeeping needed. Grace-period logic (today-or-yesterday seed) is correct for UTC-midnight rollover.
Minor: _streaks_cache in leaderboard.py is a module-level dict with a 1h TTL. If two backend workers are ever spun up, cache will diverge briefly; fine for current single-worker supervisor config.

Minor: When the current-period filter yields zero rows (e.g., Today=no sales), the LocationLeaderboard strip is hidden; the 🏆 NEW RECORD pill cannot surface even if backend records flag is set. Consider rendering an empty-state strip so records/streaks remain visible on no-data days — low priority.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on verified testids (daily-briefing, daily-briefing-flavor, visit-streak-chip all PRESENT; leaderboard-strip + record-* pill render path verified via forced-record data flip)

seed_data_creation: Temporarily set is_record=true on leaderboard_snapshots doc {period:'2026-03', badge:'top_seller'} for UI verification, then REVERTED to is_record=false. Verified via /api/leaderboard/streaks response showing records.top_seller back to null. No other seed data introduced.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend has a 1h in-memory cache on /api/leaderboard/streaks (_streaks_cache in leaderboard.py). After mutating leaderboard_snapshots in Mongo, run `sudo supervisorctl restart backend` to bust the cache before re-verifying. Auth: POST /api/auth/login with admin creds gives a Bearer token that works for both /api/auth/activity-streak and /api/leaderboard/streaks. The visit-streak-chip only shows when streak>=2 — the admin account currently has streak=3. If you reset activity_logs, the chip will disappear until 2 consecutive UTC days of activity accrue.
rca_of_the_issue: n/a — all Phase 4 features functioning as designed.
